Eiffel Tower - Wikipedia
The Eiffel Tower is a wrought-iron lattice tower on the Champ de Mars in Paris, France. It was constructed in 1889 and is 330 meters tall.
Official Eiffel Tower Website
Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower in Paris. Height: 330m (1083 ft), making it the tallest structure in Paris.
Eiffel Tower | History, Height, & Facts | Britannica
The Eiffel Tower is an iron tower in Paris that was constructed for the 1889 International Exposition. It rises 330 m (1,083 ft) above the Seine.
